desc: Cycles the clash navigator cursor forward or backward and navigates the model to the selected row.
summary: Cycles the clash navigator cursor forward or backward and navigates the model to the selected row. Uses the same framing pipeline as ClashManagerNavigateToResult.

preprompts: Moving to the next clash in the list…
Moving to the previous clash in the list…
thinkingsteps: Load latest clashresults and advance the static index…
Reuse clash navigation (section box, 3D view, zoom)…
